name: clawmux
description: Smart model routing + context compression proxy for OpenClaw

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.cjs --target node --format cjs --external @huggingface/transformers && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --target node --format cjs --external @huggingface/transformers
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run build:check
